buildCommand: npx -y pnpm@10.28.1 --filter @workspace/bet62 build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); let dir=process.cwd(); while(dir!==path.dirname(dir) && !fs.existsSync(path.join(dir,'pnpm-workspace.yaml'))) dir=path.dirname(dir); const root=dir; const src=path.join(root,'artifacts','bet62','dist'); const dst=path.join(root,'dist'); fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true});"
